long_description:
Delete the server actions to start the reclaim job

tor3-qz1-sr1-rk162-s18,  mzone2s7


Command to get server actions:
kubectl -n genctl get serveractions -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,ACTION:.spec.action,TARGET:.spec.targetUID,STATUS:.status.actionStatus

Command to delete server action for a specific BM server node:
kubectl -n genctl delete serveraction -l server_node_name=tor3-qz1-sr1-rk162-s18

https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/bare_metal_server_reclaim_failed.html#re-running-the-reclaim
Incident source: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/METAL-7765 - Shivram Srivastava
short_description: Delete the server actions to start the reclaim job
close_notes:
Issue Summary: Bare metal server reclaim failed, causing disruption to compute services.
SME Findings: The server reclaim job failed, and the incident is being handled by the assigned team.
Reason of Escalation: The incident was escalated due to the customer-facing impact and the need for prompt resolution.
Resolution Steps:
Delete the server actions to start the reclaim job.
Run the command: kubectl -n genctl get serveractions -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,ACTION:.spec.action,TARGET:.spec.targetUID,STATUS:.status.actionStatus to get server actions.
Delete the server action for the specific BM server node using the command: kubectl -n genctl delete serveraction -l server_node_name=tor3-qz1-sr1-rk162-s35.
Signature of Issue: Bare metal server reclaim failure.
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/METAL-7765.
Category/Subcategory: Compute - Development/Infrastructure Services.
Timeline Summary: The incident started on 2025-12-08 at 00:00:00 UTC, and the current status is in progress.
Resolution Runbook: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/bare_metal_server_reclaim_failed.html#re-running-the-reclaim.
Caused by Change/Incident: No change number found.
Warroom: Not specified.
Meeting URL: Not specified.
Outage Start: 2025-12-08T00:00:00.000Z.
Outage End:
